# cullDistance

**Instance Property**

The distance beyond which the framework doesn’t process the sound.

## Declaration

```swift
var cullDistance: Double { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value of this property to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEDistanceModelFadeOutParameters/init(cullDistance:)] argument.
title: cullDistance
